message:
test(engine): comprehensive test enrichment and new utility modules (~2,500 lines)

Adds extensive inline test suites and new utility modules:

Test enrichment for existing modules:
- anti_entropy.rs (+115): 9 serde roundtrip tests for ObjectId,
  FallbackTrigger, ReconcileConfig, FallbackConfig, Iblt
- ast.rs (+280): Variable declaration AST tests, clone equality,
  JSON field presence, serde boundary tests
- fork_detection.rs (+74): SafeModeState serde roundtrips,
  ForkEventType variant coverage
- portfolio_governor.rs (+71): GovernorConfig serde, ArtifactEvidence,
  MetricObservation, zero-confidence edge case
- benchmark_denominator.rs (+163): Config roundtrips, boundary
  conditions, property tests
- controller_interference_guard.rs (+149): DimensionalityConstraint,
  ConflictGraph serde roundtrips
- proof_ingestion.rs (+349): canonical_bytes content tests, hypothesis
  properties per proof type (plas, ifc, replay)
- saga_orchestrator.rs (+477): complete_step boundary conditions,
  compensation boundary, idempotency tests
- deterministic_serde.rs (+173): clone equality, deeply nested serde,
  Display uniqueness, Ord determinism
- hybrid_lane_router.rs (+31): lane_pulls field + RiskAccumulator
  empirical mean calculation test

New utility modules:
- cancel_mask.rs (+153): Bitmask-based cancellation tracking
- hash_tiers.rs (+146): Tiered hash verification (fast→thorough)
- idempotency_key.rs (+140): Deterministic idempotency key generation
- sorted_multisig.rs (+136): Sorted multi-signature aggregation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
